user.title: Aranet Cloud
user.description: Enter your Aranet Cloud API key. You can generate one from your Aranet Cloud dashboard under Account → API.

data_description.api_key: The read-only key from Account → API. It is stored encrypted and never written back to your Aranet Cloud account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Aranet Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: The Aranet Cloud rejected the saved API key. Generate a new one and paste it below.

data_description.api_key: The replacement key is validated against Aranet Cloud before being saved.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Aranet Cloud
reconfigure.description: Update the Aranet Cloud API key used for this account. The new key must belong to the same account.

data_description.api_key: The new key is validated before being saved and takes effect immediately for all sensors.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by Aranet Cloud. Double-check that you copied the full key and that it hasn't been revoked.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Aranet Cloud. Check your internet connection, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This Aranet Cloud account is already configured.

auth_failed.message: The Aranet Cloud API key was rejected. Re-authenticate with a fresh key.

update_failed.message: Could not update data from Aranet Cloud: {error}
